description: Ground truth for the resume_assistant demo — ideal agent behavior for Euro Bae applying for a FinTech Senior Backend Engineer role. Agent prompts are intentionally shallow so the judge can find gaps and the refiner can improve them.

test_cases.user_input:
EURO BAE
Dublin, Ireland | +353 0834496428 | eurobin39@gmail.com

Education
Trinity College Dublin (September 2021 – May 2027)
- Honors bachelor's in integrated computer science
- Global Excellence Undergraduate Scholarship | Trinity International Foundation Scholarship
- Software Engineering Project Industry Award (Sustainability Award) | Huawei Tech Arena 2025 LLM Hackathon (3rd Prize)
- Relevant modules: Software Engineering Project, Computer Architecture and Information Management, Algorithms and Data Structures, Concurrent Systems, Statistical Analysis
- Joined DUCSS hackathons and coding competitions to strengthen collaborative problem-solving skills

Skills
- Languages & Programming: Java, Python, C, JavaScript, TypeScript, ARM, VHDL
- Web & Front-End Development: React, React Native, Tailwind, Next.js, HTML, CSS
- Back-End & DevOps: Node.js, Docker, Git, Linux, REST API
- Database & Cloud: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, GraphQL, Oracle, AWS
- Tools & Monitoring: Grafana, Supabase, Cloudflare, OWASP ZAP, Zest, R, Expo Go
- Languages: Fluent in English and Korean

Employment
Undergraduate Demonstrator | Trinity College Dublin | Dublin (09/2025 – Present)
- Supported students in using Microsoft Expression Web 4, Python, and Excel for their coursework

Full Stack Engineer Intern (Industry-Academic Partnership) | Workday | Dublin (01/2025 – 04/2025)
- Developed and maintained both frontend (React) and backend (Node.js) components, contributing to over 80% of the codebase
- Established a CI/CD pipeline by configuring GitLab Runner on a Raspberry Pi, utilizing SSH tunneling for secure remote management
- Migrated database and server to Raspberry Pi, cutting energy use by ~93% and supporting green computing

Software Engineer Trainee | Samsung SDS | Suwon (02/2024 – 07/2024)
- Automated sample workflows using RPA tools during Samsung Bootcamp, improving task efficiency in demo environments
- Prototyped a smart factory system by combining RPA, ML, and IoT during Samsung RPA Bootcamp

Military Police Sergeant | Ministry of National Defense | Suwon (08/2022 – 02/2024)
- Conducted thorough investigations of potential breaches of military law and policy
- Utilized intelligence-gathering technology and implemented command structures to enhance operational efficiency

Data Analyst Intern | Media & Data Institute | Seoul (05/2021 – 09/2021)
- Refactored the data access layer by migrating from SQL to GraphQL, improving data flexibility and frontend integration
- Gained hands-on experience in data governance and privacy, collaborating on policies aligned with ethical data collection practices

Software Projects
A.T.M. (Automated Trading Manager)
- Built a Python-based trading bot integrating Binance API, executing automated trades based on technical signals and market conditions
- Implemented stop-loss and entry logic, improving simulated returns in test runs
- Analyzed transaction fees and macro indicators to optimize trade execution strategy

AURA (AI-based Work Efficiency Enhancer)
- Led a team of 5 to build an AI-powered productivity tracker platform combining webcam, mouse/keyboard data, and language models
- Integrated Azure Face API and OpenAI to assess concentration levels and generate productivity insights
- Conducted code reviews and finalized deployment, ensuring a cohesive UX across all integrated modules

OLY (Community-Driven Expat Platform)
- Led a 7-member development team, coordinating task allocation, version control, and technical decision-making, while deploying the app to TestFlight and Google Play internal testing
- Developed a full-stack community platform app using React Native, Expo, and Supabase, implementing marketplace, rental, currency exchange, chat, and authentication features
test_cases.job_description:
Senior Backend Engineer - FinTech Startup

We're looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to join our core platform team. You'll design and build scalable APIs and services that power our next-generation payments infrastructure.

Requirements:
- 3+ years of backend development experience
- Strong proficiency in Python or Go
- Experience with microservices architecture and distributed systems
- Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS preferred)
- Experience with relational databases (PostgreSQL) and caching (Redis)
- Understanding of CI/CD pipelines and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes)

Nice to have:
- Experience in fintech or payments
- AWS certification
- Experience leading technical projects or mentoring junior engineers
- Familiarity with event-driven architectures (Kafka, RabbitMQ)

Global Excellence Undergraduate Scholarship; Trinity International Foundation Scholarship. Awards: Software Engineering Project Industry Award (Sustainability), Huawei Tech Arena 2025 LLM Hackathon 3rd Prize."], "skills": ["Python", "Java", "JavaScript", "TypeScript", "C", "Node.js", "React", "React Native", "Next.js", "Docker", "Git", "Linux", "REST API", "PostgreSQL", "MySQL", "MongoDB", "GraphQL", "AWS", "Grafana", "Supabase", "Cloudflare"], "experience": ["Undergraduate Demonstrator, Trinity College Dublin (09/2025–present): supported students with Python, Excel, Microsoft Expression Web 4.", "Full Stack Engineer Intern, Workday (01/2025–04/2025): built React + Node.js features covering 80%+ of codebase; set up CI/CD via GitLab Runner on Raspberry Pi with SSH tunneling; migrated DB to Raspberry Pi cutting energy use ~93%.", "Software Engineer Trainee, Samsung SDS (02/2024–07/2024): automated workflows with RPA; prototyped smart factory combining RPA, ML, IoT.", "Military Police Sergeant, Ministry of National Defense (08/2022–02/2024): investigations, intelligence-gathering tech, command structures.", "Data Analyst Intern, Media & Data Institute (05/2021–09/2021): migrated data layer from SQL to GraphQL; data governance and privacy work."], "projects": ["A.T.M. (Automated Trading Manager): Python trading bot with Binance API, stop-loss and entry logic, macro indicator analysis.", "AURA: AI productivity tracker (team of 5) with Azure Face API + OpenAI; webcam/keyboard data + LLM insights.", "OLY: full-stack community platform (team of 7) using React Native, Expo, Supabase; marketplace, rental, currency exchange, chat, auth features; deployed to TestFlight and Google Play."], "certifications": [], "summary": "Full-stack engineer with strong Python, Node.js, and cloud (AWS, Docker) skills; proven experience delivering CI/CD pipelines, database migrations, and team-led projects."}
expected_agent_outputs.resume_job_analyzer: {"role": "Senior Backend Engineer", "required_skills": ["Python", "Go", "microservices", "distributed systems", "AWS", "PostgreSQL", "Redis", "Docker", "Kubernetes", "CI/CD"], "preferred_skills": ["fintech or payments experience", "AWS certification", "technical leadership", "mentoring", "Kafka", "RabbitMQ", "event-driven architecture"], "keywords": ["payments infrastructure", "scalable APIs", "backend services", "microservices", "distributed systems", "cloud", "containerization"], "experience_level": "Senior", "domain": "FinTech / Payments"}
expected_agent_outputs.resume_writer: One-page LaTeX resume front-loading Python/AWS/Docker keywords, tailoring Workday bullet points toward payments/microservices, framing the ATM project as fintech-adjacent, and including a summary section that leads with backend/cloud experience.
expected_agent_outputs.resume_reviewer:
## Overall Score
7/10 — Strong Python/backend foundation and CI/CD experience align well with core requirements. Missing Redis and Kubernetes.

## Strengths
- Python and Node.js backend experience matches primary stack
- PostgreSQL and Docker usage confirmed across multiple roles
- CI/CD pipeline built from scratch demonstrates DevOps competence
- Led multi-person engineering teams (OLY: 7; AURA: 5)

## Keyword Gaps
- Redis (explicitly required, not mentioned)
- Kubernetes (explicitly required, not mentioned)
- Microservices (pattern used but word absent)
- Payments / payments infrastructure

## Rewrite Suggestions
- Workday: "Migrated PostgreSQL database" → "Migrated and optimised PostgreSQL database; introduced query caching strategy"
- ATM: "Built automated trading bot" → "Built Python-based automated trading service with event-driven signal processing — relevant to payments infrastructure design"

test_cases.expected_behavior: resume_info_collector extracts all fields including certifications as an empty list and produces structured JSON with multi-bullet experience entries. resume_job_analyzer identifies Redis and Kubernetes as required skills and distinguishes required vs preferred. resume_writer produces a one-page LaTeX resume with Python/AWS keywords front-loaded for ATS and bullet points tailored to payments/microservices. resume_reviewer gives a specific numeric score, names missing keywords (Redis, Kubernetes), and suggests concrete rewrites of existing bullets.
judge_notes: resume_info_collector may miss the certifications field entirely
resume_info_collector may collapse multi-bullet experience entries into single strings
resume_job_analyzer may omit Redis and Kubernetes from required skills
resume_job_analyzer may not distinguish required vs preferred skills
resume_writer may not front-load Python/AWS keywords for ATS
resume_writer may produce a two-page resume instead of one page
resume_writer may not tailor bullet points to payments/microservices domain
resume_reviewer may give a generic score without per-section feedback
resume_reviewer may not name specific missing keywords like Redis or Kubernetes
resume_reviewer may not suggest concrete rewordings of existing bullet points
